findings.description: The knowledge file annotates the ProcessAbnormalEnd code example with '（第1引数: 終了コード、第2引数: 障害コード）', but the source file does not explain the constructor argument semantics. The source only shows the code `throw new ProcessAbnormalEnd(100, "UM900003");` without labeling the parameters.
findings.source_evidence: Source shows only: `throw new ProcessAbnormalEnd(100, "UM900003");` with no surrounding explanation of argument meanings.
